evals.prompt: Here's a Gemini share link I want to archive: https://gemini.google.com/share/dea848184b75 — can you capture the full chat content and save it?
evals.expected_output: Claude should run bootstrap.sh to set up Playwright, then run capture.sh with the URL. It should report the output directory (/tmp/llm_share_capture.*) and list the saved files (body.txt, page.png, requests.txt, title.txt, meta.json).

assertions.description: Response includes running bootstrap.sh to set up Playwright/Chromium
Response includes running capture.sh with the Gemini share URL as argument
Response mentions expected output artifacts (body.txt, page.png, or /tmp output directory)

evals.prompt: I have this ChatGPT shared conversation I'd like to save: https://chatgpt.com/share/e/abc12345def00000000000000 — grab the text and screenshot for me
evals.expected_output: Claude should run bootstrap.sh then capture.sh with the ChatGPT share URL. Should mention the output artifacts and where they're saved.

assertions.description: Response includes running bootstrap.sh to set up Playwright/Chromium
Response includes running capture.sh with the ChatGPT share URL as argument
Response specifically mentions the screenshot output (page.png) since user asked for it

evals.prompt: save this shared chat to my notes: https://gemini.google.com/share/f2c3d4e5a6b7
evals.expected_output: Claude should recognize this as an LLM share URL, run bootstrap.sh and capture.sh, and report the capture directory and key output files.

assertions.description: Response includes running bootstrap.sh (even for a casual, short request)
Response includes running capture.sh with the share URL
Response does NOT suggest using WebFetch/curl as the approach (those can't render JS-heavy share pages)
